categories.name: Blog
categories.description: Themes optimized for personal blogs, writers, and content-heavy sites.

categories.description: WooCommerce and online store themes for selling physical or digital products.

coupons.description: 10% off your first purchase on any paid theme.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Orion Agency Pro is a multipurpose agency theme built for Elementor and WooCommerce. This documentation covers installation, demo import, customization, and advanced tips.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content:
1. Download the orion-agency-pro.zip file from your account.
2. In your WordPress dashboard, go to Appearance > Themes > Add New.
3. Click Upload Theme and choose the ZIP file.
4. Click Install Now, then Activate.
5. Install and activate required plugins when prompted (Elementor, Orion Core, WooCommerce if needed).

sections.title: Demo Import
sections.content: Navigate to Appearance > Orion Setup > Demo Import. Choose an agency starter site and click Import. Wait until the process finishes without closing the tab.

sections.title: Customization
sections.content: Use Elementor to edit pages visually. Global colors, typography, and header/footer layouts can be managed under Appearance > Customize > Orion Options.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Minima Blog is a clean blogging theme focused on readability and performance.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Install Minima Blog via Appearance > Themes > Add New, then upload the minima-blog.zip file, install, and activate. Next, install the Minima Toolkit plugin when prompted.

sections.title: Customization
sections.content: All layout and color options are available under Appearance > Customize > Minima Settings. Use the blog layout panel to switch between list, grid, and masonry.

sections.title: Performance Tips
sections.content: Enable image lazy loading and minification from Minima > Performance in your dashboard. Avoid installing unnecessary plugins to keep your site fast.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Nexus Woo Shop is a WooCommerce-focused theme for small to medium online stores.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content:
1. Install the nexus-woo-shop.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New.
2. Activate the theme.
3. Install WooCommerce and the Nexus Addons plugin when prompted.
4. Run the WooCommerce setup wizard to configure currency, shipping, and payments.

sections.title: Products Setup
sections.content: Add products under Products > Add New. Use the extra product gallery settings added by Nexus to configure hover effects and badges.

sections.title: Theme Options
sections.content: Go to Appearance > Customize > Store Layout to configure product grid columns, sidebar position, and shop header.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Gutenberg Starter Free is a lightweight block-based theme fully compatible with the WordPress site editor.

sections.title: Getting Started / Installation
sections.content: Search for "Gutenberg Starter Free" under Appearance > Themes > Add New > Search. Click Install, then Activate. No additional plugins are required.

sections.title: Block Patterns
sections.content: Browse pre-built block patterns under the Patterns tab in the block inserter. Insert a layout and customize text, images, and colors as needed.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Corporate Plus Enterprise is a business/corporate theme with advanced header options, mega menu support, and WooCommerce integration.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Upload corporate-plus-enterprise.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New. Activate the theme, then install the Corporate Toolkit and recommended page builder when prompted.

sections.title: Demo Import
sections.content: Navigate to Corporate Plus > Starter Sites. Choose a demo (Consulting, SaaS, or Agency), then click Import. Wait for the status to reach 100%.

sections.title: Business Features
sections.content: Use the Services, Team, and Case Study custom post types under the Corporate menu to build your corporate site structure.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Storyline Blog is a narrative-style blog theme ideal for long-form content and storytelling.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Install storyline-blog.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New. Activate the theme and follow the onboarding wizard to set your homepage and blog page.

sections.title: Writing Mode
sections.content: Enable distraction-free reading mode under Appearance > Customize > Storyline > Reading Experience to highlight content and dim surrounding elements.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Grand Commerce is a premium WooCommerce theme designed for large catalogs and multi-category stores.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content:
1. Download grand-commerce.zip from your account dashboard.
2. In WordPress, navigate to Appearance > Themes > Add New.
3. Click Upload Theme, select the ZIP file, and click Install Now.
4. After installation, click Activate.
5. When prompted, install and activate the Grand Core plugin and WooCommerce.
6. Go to Appearance > Permalinks and click Save Changes once to refresh rewrite rules.

sections.title: Server Requirements
sections.content: Recommended: PHP 8.0+, max_memory_limit 256M, max_execution_time 120s, and HTTPS enabled. Contact your host if you need help updating these values.

sections.title: Demo Import
sections.content: Open Grand Commerce > Demo Import. Choose a demo (Fashion, Electronics, Marketplace) and click Import. Ensure WooCommerce sample data is installed for full layouts.

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content: If you see a blank page after activation, temporarily disable all plugins except WooCommerce and Grand Core, then re-enable them one by one to find conflicts.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Lens Photography Portfolio is a minimal photography theme with fullscreen galleries and client proofing.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Install lens-photography-portfolio.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New and activate. Install the Lens Blocks plugin when prompted.

sections.title: Galleries
sections.content: Create galleries under Portfolio > Add New. Assign categories like Weddings, Portraits, or Travel, and choose the gallery layout from the Lens Settings box.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Aura Photo Portfolio is a dark, minimal theme for photographers and visual artists.

sections.title: Getting Started / Installation
sections.content: From your WordPress dashboard, go to Appearance > Themes > Add New > Upload and select aura-photo-portfolio.zip. Click Install Now, then Activate. Install required plugins when prompted.

sections.title: Client Proofing
sections.content: Enable client proofing under Aura > Settings. Mark selected galleries as proofing galleries and send the private link to your clients.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Snapshot Photography is a grid-style portfolio theme optimized for showcasing large sets of images.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Upload snapshot-photography.zip under Appearance > Themes > Add New, install, and activate. Then install the Snapshot Shortcodes plugin.

sections.title: Homepage Setup
sections.content: Set a static page as your homepage under Settings > Reading, then assign the "Snapshot Grid" template to that page.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Lightning Fast Blog is a performance-focused blogging theme with aggressive optimization defaults.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Install lightning-fast-blog.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New. Activate and run the onboarding wizard to configure caching and image optimization.

sections.title: Performance & Caching
sections.content: Under Lightning > Performance, enable CSS/JS minification, critical CSS, and lazy loading. Test your site with PageSpeed Insights after enabling options.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Subscribe Newsletter Blog is built for content creators who prioritize email list growth and lead generation.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Upload subscribe-newsletter-blog.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New and activate. Install the Subscribe Blocks plugin and your preferred email marketing integration plugin when prompted.

sections.title: Newsletter Setup
sections.content: Navigate to Subscribe > Integrations and connect your provider (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, etc.) using an API key. Use the built-in Subscribe Header and Inline Opt-in blocks on your posts.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Nocturne Magazine is a magazine/news theme featuring a built-in dark mode toggle and multiple article layouts.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Install nocturne-magazine.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New, activate it, and install the Nocturne Elements plugin when prompted.

sections.title: Dark Mode
sections.content: Enable dark mode under Appearance > Customize > Nocturne > Dark Mode. Choose between always-on dark, reader toggle, or auto-switch based on system preference.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Mercato WooCommerce is a clean storefront theme for small catalogs and boutique shops.

sections.title: Getting Started / Installation
sections.content: Search for "Mercato WooCommerce" under Appearance > Themes > Add New if using the repository version, or upload mercato-woocommerce.zip if you downloaded it. Activate and follow the setup wizard.

sections.title: Shop Customization
sections.content: Control shop layout, product card style, and checkout optimizations under Appearance > Customize > Mercato Shop.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Summit Business is a corporate theme tailored for agencies, consultants, and SaaS companies.

sections.title: Installation
sections.content: Upload summit-business.zip via Appearance > Themes > Add New and activate. Install Summit Core and your selected page builder plugin when prompted.

sections.title: Homepage Layouts
sections.content: Select a homepage layout under Appearance > Customize > Summit > Homepage. Assign a static front page in Settings > Reading for the best experience.

themes.name: Orion Agency Pro
themes.short_description: Multipurpose Elementor agency theme with WooCommerce support and one-click demos.
themes.full_description: Orion Agency Pro is a flexible multipurpose WordPress theme built for creative agencies, freelancers, and SaaS startups. It ships with multiple Elementor-based starter sites, full WooCommerce integration, and a one-click demo importer so you can launch polished websites quickly.

themes.name: Minima Blog
themes.short_description: Minimal blogging theme focused on readability and clean typography.
themes.full_description: Minima Blog is a clean and minimal WordPress theme for writers and content creators. With spacious layouts, carefully chosen typography, and multiple blog styles, it helps your readers focus on the content. It includes a one-click demo import to match the preview layout in minutes.

themes.name: Storyline Blog
themes.short_description: Narrative-style blog theme ideal for long-form storytelling.
themes.full_description: Storyline Blog is designed for long-form content, travel journals, and storytelling blogs. It features focused reading layouts, subtle animations, and multiple post header styles. Use the one-click demo import to recreate the demo layout and then customize colors and fonts via the Customizer.

themes.name: Lightning Fast Blog
themes.short_description: High-performance blog theme optimized for Core Web Vitals.
themes.full_description: Lightning Fast Blog is built for speed. With lean assets, aggressive code splitting, and optimized images, it helps your blog score highly on performance tests. It includes multiple hero styles, a sticky sidebar, and instant one-click demo import for quick setup.

themes.name: Subscribe Newsletter Blog
themes.short_description: Email list–focused blog theme with built-in newsletter signup blocks.
themes.full_description: Subscribe Newsletter Blog is crafted for content marketers and newsletter creators. It ships with header opt-in bars, inline post opt-ins, and dedicated landing pages for lead magnets. Connect to popular email providers and start growing your list from day one.

themes.name: Gutenberg Starter Free
themes.short_description: Lightweight block-based theme fully compatible with the site editor.
themes.full_description: Gutenberg Starter Free is a modern, block-first theme that leverages the full site editor. It includes multiple block patterns for homepages, about pages, and blog layouts. Perfect as a base for simple blogs or small business sites.

themes.name: Nexus Woo Shop
themes.short_description: WooCommerce-focused theme for modern online shops.
themes.full_description: Nexus Woo Shop is a WooCommerce-centric theme for small and medium online stores. It offers multiple product grid layouts, customizable shop headers, and AJAX cart features. One-click demo import lets you replicate any of the included demos quickly.

themes.name: Grand Commerce
themes.short_description: Premium WooCommerce theme for large catalogs and marketplaces.
themes.full_description: Grand Commerce is built for large-scale WooCommerce stores and marketplaces. It includes advanced mega menus, multi-row product grids, and extensive shop filters. Designed to handle large catalogs with performance optimizations and flexible layouts.

themes.name: Mercato WooCommerce
themes.short_description: Clean WooCommerce storefront for small catalogs and boutiques.
themes.full_description: Mercato WooCommerce is a minimalist storefront theme tailored to small catalogs and boutiques. It focuses on clear product presentation, simple checkout flows, and mobile-first design. Ideal for small shops that want a clean and modern look.

themes.name: Lens Photography Portfolio
themes.short_description: Fullscreen photography portfolio with client proofing support.
themes.full_description: Lens Photography Portfolio is a minimal theme for photographers who want fullscreen galleries and simple client proofing. Organize your work into collections, password-protect client galleries, and showcase your images with edge-to-edge layouts.

themes.name: Aura Photo Portfolio
themes.short_description: Dark, minimal photography theme with client proofing features.
themes.full_description: Aura Photo Portfolio offers a dark, cinematic look for photographers and visual artists. It includes multiple gallery layouts, smooth page transitions, and built-in client proofing so clients can select their favorite images directly from the site.

themes.name: Snapshot Photography
themes.short_description: Grid-style photography portfolio optimized for large image sets.
themes.full_description: Snapshot Photography is a grid-focused portfolio theme designed to showcase large numbers of images. It supports infinite scroll, masonry layouts, and category filters so visitors can quickly browse your work.

themes.name: Nocturne Magazine
themes.short_description: Dark-mode magazine theme with multiple article layouts and toggles.
themes.full_description: Nocturne Magazine is a modern magazine/news theme with a built-in dark mode toggle. It offers featured article carousels, multiple archive layouts, and flexible header options, making it ideal for tech blogs and news sites.

themes.name: Corporate Plus Enterprise
themes.short_description: Enterprise-ready corporate theme with WooCommerce and mega menu support.
themes.full_description: Corporate Plus Enterprise is a robust corporate theme tailored for enterprises, agencies, and SaaS companies. It offers flexible header layouts, mega menus, and full WooCommerce integration for selling services or digital products.

themes.name: Summit Business
themes.short_description: Corporate theme for agencies, consultants, and SaaS businesses.
themes.full_description: Summit Business provides clean, conversion-focused layouts for agencies and SaaS companies. It includes pricing tables, case study layouts, and flexible hero sections to present your services clearly.

themes.name: Feather Blog
themes.short_description: Lightweight blog theme with one-click demo import and clean design.
themes.full_description: Feather Blog is a lightweight, minimal theme for bloggers who want a simple and fast site. It includes a one-click demo import, customizable colors and typography, and support for standard post formats.

themes.name: Free Classic Blog
themes.short_description: Classic blog layout theme compatible with Gutenberg editor.
themes.full_description: Free Classic Blog offers a traditional blog layout with a sidebar, simple typography, and Gutenberg compatibility. Ideal for personal blogs and journals looking for a straightforward design.

themes.name: Free Magazine Block
themes.short_description: Block-based magazine theme with Gutenberg layouts.
themes.full_description: Free Magazine Block is a Gutenberg-first theme for magazines and news sites. It includes block patterns for featured stories, category sections, and newsletter signups, allowing quick layout creation.
